name: web-translation-plugin
description: Browser extension for selection-based web translation.
author: Plasmo Corp. <foss@plasmo.com>

scripts.test:e2e:mock: npm run build && playwright test tests/e2e/selection-flow.spec.ts
scripts.check:submit: npm run check:codex && npm run check:docs && npm run check:memory && npm run test:ui-logic && npm run check:live-gate
scripts.check:local: npm run check:codex && npm run check:docs && npm run check:memory && npm run test:ui-logic && npm run test:e2e:mock && npm run check:live-gate
scripts.check:verify: npm run check:local && npm run package
